title: CreateAndChill
description: its an nice and cozy farm/create modpack
body: This modpack combines the automation potential of Create with extensive farming features. Players can build complex machines to efficiently cultivate fields, process crops, and create new foods. With additional mods for expanded plant variety, animal breeding, and realistic agriculture, it offers an immersive farming experience perfectly enhanced by Create’s mechanical possibilities. Ideal for players who love creative building and sustainable production in Minecraft! 🌾⚙️
